title: Personal Jesus
meaning_summary: Personal Jesus still earns because its riff and title remain culturally sticky, making it one of Depeche Mode's most reusable songs across catalog listening and media placement.
revenue_drivers: Alternative and classic-synth playlists keep the song in regular circulation.
Its recognizable riff and title support strong long-tail recall.
Sync and cover-culture relevance help maintain commercial value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from long-tail streaming, catalog replay value, and sync utility, using typical major-label legacy rights splits.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears strongly tied to songwriter-side participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is assumed here
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.
